prompt:
It's the May 2026 close and I need to book this month's property bills as journal entries — give me a table I can review before posting. All amounts are AED and include 5% VAT where applicable:
- DEWA electricity & water for unit A-1203 (rev-share, owner Khan): AED 1,260
- Turnover cleaning by SparkleClean for unit A-1203: AED 420
- Plumbing repair by FixIt at unit A-1203 (rev-share): AED 735
- DEWA for unit L-0907 (this is one of our leased units): AED 980
- Emicool district cooling for unit B-0801 (rev-share, owner Mensah): AED 588

assertions.text: Rev-share DEWA (A-1203) debits Landlord Receivable — Utilities (120060)
Rev-share plumbing R&M (FixIt) debits Landlord Receivable — R&M (120059)
Turnover cleaning (SparkleClean) is Silkhaus-borne to Unit Cleaning Expenses (620013)
Leased-unit DEWA (L-0907) is Silkhaus-borne to DEWA Consumption (640004)
Emicool cooling on a rev-share unit also debits Landlord Receivable — Utilities (120060)
Splits 5% Input VAT to VAT on Purchases (110038)
Every entry balances and the totals block foots to 3,983.00
Uses only real Silkhaus GL codes (no invented placeholder accounts like 'Due from Owner')
